growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: Rich medium cultures were grown to saturation (20 to 24 h; 5 or 6 cell doublings)...
growth_records.notes: Same shared CPG growth-to-saturation data as GMI1000 record (paper does not report per-strain doubling counts for CPG): 20-24 h, 5-6 doublings. Midpoint calc: doubling_time_h=22/5.5=4.0h; mu=ln2/4.0=0.1733 h-1.

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: minimal medium cultures were grown for over 48 h (5 or 6 cell doublings for strains PSI07 and GMI1000...).
growth_records.notes: Same shared minimal-medium data as GMI1000 record: 5-6 doublings in >48h. doubling_time_h=48/5.5=8.73h; mu=ln2/8.73=0.0794 h-1 (upper-bound mu estimate since actual time exceeded 48h).

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: ...grown for 25 h (7 or 8 doublings for GMI1000 and 8 or 9 doublings for PSI07).
growth_records.notes: PSI07 in xylem sap: 8 or 9 doublings in 25 h. Midpoint doublings=8.5: doubling_time_h=25/8.5=2.94h; mu=ln2/2.94=0.2357 h-1.
